title_guess: Stapeley Water Gardens; then London (move Thomas to Mountview Rd)

pages.text:
__Sunday 22nd August.__
	After church we went to Stapeley Water Gardens with Jim, Margaret & Helen & Polly, the American cousin/nannie. The gardens weren't very good – it was mostly an indoors zoo. We had lunch there, & ended with John's birthday tea. But his brothers teased him for being fat until he cried, so it was pretty dreadful.

__Friday 3rd Sept__
	Simon, Thomas & Eve set off early for London. Thomas went into the centre & Trinity College. Simon & Eve trailed around shops & architects in hot heat. Jonathan showed Eve good curtain material for the bedroom.
	We moved Thomas into 32 Mountview Rd, N4. The hoovers were both broken. Then we drove to David's & went to a restaurant for Jim & Margaret's diamond wedding anniversary. Sally's having a baby & Dylan's got [?diabetes] [strikethrough: [illegible]]. The food was delicious.
	We spent the night on Mountview Rd.
